info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: “ asya ca arteH GfpraBftitvepi BAzAyAmapi prayogaH dfSyate  tacca ' bahulaM Candasi ' (7.4.78) ityeva ittve sidDe arteH pfTag ittvaviDAnasAmarTyAt avasIyate ' iti ' artipipartyoSca ' (7.4.77) ityatra BAzye sTitam “ iti puruzakAre lIlASukaH  bAlamanoramAyAM mA.DA. vfttO cApi ayamaMSaH vivftaH  ' tatretyFcCatItyarteH Sni gatO syAd fRAti tu ' (Slo. 30) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samudrAdUrmirmaDumA~ udArat' (f0 4581 vA0 saM0 1789 Apa0 SrO0 55174) udArat udagacCat
'ayaM me pIta udiyarti vAcam' (f0 6473) udiyarti samIrayati prayojayati
'sa BandanA udiyarti prajAvatIH' (f0 98641 ni0 52) udiyarti udIrayatIti durgaH
